ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "catalyst" INTEGER /* Catalyst used in the experiment */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the experiment */,
  "through_time" REAL /* Through time of the experiment */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question for the experiment */,
  "hypothesis" TEXT /* Hypothesis for the experiment */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Experimental design for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalysts" (
  "catalyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catalyst */,
  "catalyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the catalyst */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the catalyst */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the catalyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalysts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES catalyst_suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalyst_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions_history" (
  "version_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version history belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_history_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalyst_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "catalyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the catalyst the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalyst_characteristics_catalyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("catalyst_id") REFERENCES catalysts ("catalyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_fractions" (
  "feed_fraction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed fraction */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the feed fraction belongs to */,
  "fraction_1" REAL /* Feed fraction 1 */,
  "fraction_2" REAL /* Feed fraction 2 */,
  "fraction_3" REAL /* Feed fraction 3 */,
  "fraction_4" REAL /* Feed fraction 4 */,
  "fraction_5" REAL /* Feed fraction 5 */,
  "fraction_6" REAL /* Feed fraction 6 */,
  "fraction_7" REAL /* Feed fraction 7 */,
  "fraction_8" REAL /* Feed fraction 8 */,
  "fraction_9" REAL /* Feed fraction 9 */,
  "fraction_10" REAL /* Feed fraction 10 */,
  "fraction_11" REAL /* Feed fraction 11 */,
  "fraction_12" REAL /* Feed fraction 12 */,
  "fraction_13" REAL /* Feed fraction 13 */,
  "fraction_14" REAL /* Feed fraction 14 */,
  "fraction_15" REAL /* Feed fraction 15 */,
  "fraction_16" REAL /* Feed fraction 16 */,
  "fraction_17" REAL /* Feed fraction 17 */,
  "fraction_18" REAL /* Feed fraction 18 */,
  "fraction_19" REAL /* Feed fraction 19 */,
  "fraction_20" REAL /* Feed fraction 20 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_fraction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_fractions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "out_fractions" (
  "out_fraction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each out fraction */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the out fraction belongs to */,
  "fraction_1" REAL /* Out fraction 1 */,
  "fraction_2" REAL /* Out fraction 2 */,
  "fraction_3" REAL /* Out fraction 3 */,
  "fraction_4" REAL /* Out fraction 4 */,
  "fraction_5" REAL /* Out fraction 5 */,
  "fraction_6" REAL /* Out fraction 6 */,
  "fraction_7" REAL /* Out fraction 7 */,
  "fraction_8" REAL /* Out fraction 8 */,
  "fraction_9" REAL /* Out fraction 9 */,
  "fraction_10" REAL /* Out fraction 10 */,
  "fraction_11" REAL /* Out fraction 11 */,
  "fraction_12" REAL /* Out fraction 12 */,
  "fraction_13" REAL /* Out fraction 13 */,
  "fraction_14" REAL /* Out fraction 14 */,
  "fraction_15" REAL /* Out fraction 15 */,
  "fraction_16" REAL /* Out fraction 16 */,
  "fraction_17" REAL /* Out fraction 17 */,
  "fraction_18" REAL /* Out fraction 18 */,
  "fraction_19" REAL /* Out fraction 19 */,
  "fraction_20" REAL /* Out fraction 20 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("out_fraction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_out_fractions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
